message:
fix: match video container aspect ratio to cropped video, fix marked v17 types

- Changed video container from aspect-video (16:9) to aspect-[1428/972]
  matching the actual cropped video dimensions so object-cover no longer
  clips top/bottom content
- Fixed spec-evolution-lab.tsx: removed deprecated marked options
  (headerIds, mangle, highlight) and awaited marked.parse() per v17 API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -122,7 +122,7 @@ export default function HomePage() {
               <BorderBeam />
 
               {/* Auto-playing Rio Recording */}
-              <div className="relative aspect-video bg-black rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]">
+              <div className="relative aspect-[1428/972] bg-black rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]">
                  <video
                   autoPlay
                   muted
